feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: I Choose You (A 9-1-1 x Pokemon Crossover)
entry.summary:
Author: Unhingedoveractivemuse

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,967Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 183

Summary: Evan Buckley loves Pokémon. From his morning and early afternoons chasing and playing with the family Eevee and the neighbor's Skitty to cuddling with the family Eevee and Maddie's as his sister reads him a bedtime story, the time spent with the amazing creatures are the highlights of his day. Those moments are when he stops feeling lonely. So when, one day, he comes face to face with a Growlithe and is told it's going to be his Pokémon, all his wishes seem to have come true in an instant.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Why?
entry.summary:
Author: buckmeetsboy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,893Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: "Are you married?” Christopher coughed so hard he nearly dropped his phone. Buck choked on nothing. Eddie said, “No.” Theo turned to Buck. “Why?” Buck’s mouth opened. Eddie got there first. “Because you have to ask someone before you marry them.” Theo considered this. Then he looked at Buck. “Did you ask?” “No,” Buck said quickly. Theo looked at Eddie. “Did you ask?” “No.” “Why?” Christopher whispered, “Great question.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 195,548Chapters: 48/?Kudos: 117

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: Cathartic Vulnerability of the Glass Closet
entry.summary:
Author: serendipitouswasteland

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,308Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 15

Summary: When something is cathartic, it brings about a relief of strong emotions. The concept of vulnerability being cathartic appears counter-intuitive. Vulnerability and catharsis together should be such, yet it truly embodies something far more profound. Its is the relief that comes from laying yourself bare to another human being in such an emotional way and receiving only love in return that brings about cathartic vulnerability. In this moment, that is what Buck and Eddie share as their lips intertwine and bodies press together. The closet glass that has been surrounding them for a near decade shatters with the crash, leaving them spread open in honesty and truth for the years to come.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Love, You're Not Alone ('Cause I'm Gonna Stand By You)
entry.summary:
Author: BekahRose

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,664Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: From this vantage point, looking down at Buck, Eddie can see the disappointment still lingering at the edge's of Buck's expression. They've had similar conversations, notably following visits from the Buckley parents, where Buck doubts that the life he lives is full and rich because it doesn't adhere to someone else's idea of what success looks like. Normally, Eddie's able to talk him through it with a few thinly veiled insults at the kind of life Margaret and Phillip Buckley have led, compared to Buck's life of adventure and joy, but he's not sure that that particular tactic will work this time.Instead, he lifts a hand to cup Buck's cheek, his thumb sweeping across the delicate skin under his eye. "I love Harry like a kid brother," Eddie tells him. "But he's wrong."OREddie and Buck have a conversation about becoming Theo's foster carer.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Placeholders: They Come And They Go
entry.summary:
Author: BuckyBoils

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,629Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 4

Summary: “Buck?” he whimpers. Buck rubs his cheek on the skin right where his jugular is, voice letting out a constant rumble.He’s purring, Eddie realizes. Buck’s purring.With a rough exhale, he puts his lips on Eddie's neck, smearing blood and goo all over him. And there’s a sudden flick of a tongue, a feeling that makes Eddie’s knees buckle.“Are you scared?” Buck croaks out. It’s the first thing he’s said since he came here.“For you,” Eddie says. “I’m scared for you, bud. I just wanna know what’s wrong, you know, to-to protect you, to keep you safe.”“Safe?”“Yeah. I just wanna help you, Buck. You’re my best friend.”Buck rubs his stubble on Eddie’s. “Yours.”“Yeah,” Eddie says. “So, please.”And that’s when Buck bites.———Or Buck changes overnight. A Jennifer's Body AU.

entry.title: No longer useful
entry.summary:
Author: KJ_Writing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,925Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Buck is in withdrawals, but the 118 thinks he's just sick. Chim sends him home, and Buck ends up trying to relieve his chills with the warmest thing at his house - his hot tub. It doesn't go well.

entry.title: Heatwave
entry.summary:
Author: marykith123

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,734Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: “hey, hey, can you hear me?” Eddie tried to catch the look in the man's eyes, which flew anywhere around him until it fixated on Eddie and decided not to leave just yet .“wow, shirtless so fast and i didnt even get your name” Buck ignored entirely the question Eddie just asked. He tried to move his head out of instinct, but suddenly stopped when he realized the reason he was left without his shirt. “Im Eddie Diaz, I was a paramedic. You were hurt and I'm here to help you but firefighters will be here soon. Don't move your head, it's dangerous, and don't flatter yourself”, Eddie was more focused on keeping him awake until help arrives. He placed himself behind Buck's head and lifted him a little higher so he wouldn't choke on his own blood. “How are you even conscious? Does it hurt?” “Oh it's only like hell” - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - au where Buck and Eddies first meeting wasnt in the station, but when Eddie just moved to LA and caught Buck in a time of an emergancy.

entry.title: I'll Bleed Until I Find You
entry.summary:
Author: MoonlitRescue

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,598Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 94

Summary: Buck goes back into the water without thinking, without caring that his leg is already failing him or that the current is still strong enough to drag him out to sea. Buck finds Christopher. He brings him back. But when he wakes up, all he can remember is the moment Christopher was gone, the broken glasses in his hand, and Eddie’s trust turning into something Buck no longer thinks he deserves. Or What if Buck saved Christopher from the tsunami, and woke up convinced Eddie would never trust him again?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,013Chapters: 19/24Kudos: 597

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: Running Back Home
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,359Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 223

Summary: Buck is no stranger to being alone. He spent years fending for himself after leaving the house he grew up in, and even the years before that, he didn’t really have anyone.He thought he had found a family with the 118. He had a captain he came to see as a father, found a mother in Athena and a wider family from his coworkers and theirs. Buck even thought he might have a chance at something more with the man who was his best friend and his son. He should have known better. -+- A post-lawsuit fic (kind of) where Buck leaves and never really had any intention of coming back. The universe has different plans for him though. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.summary:

entry.title: I'll bring you home
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,891Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 105

Summary: After a tragic accident leaves Connor and Kameron’s son orphaned, Buck struggles with what role he’s supposed to play in Theo’s life — and whether someone like him could ever be enough for a child. Before he and Eddie can figure any of that out, the 118 is called to an active hostage situation at a Los Angeles junior high school. What starts as another terrifying call quickly turns into every firefighter’s nightmare.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 746,706Chapters: 93/?Kudos: 37

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Henrietta "Hen" Wilson/Karen Wilson

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,024,904Chapters: 100/?Kudos: 131

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Name, Written in Mystery
entry.summary:
Author: White_Tape_01

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,012Chapters: 2/9Kudos: 9

Summary: Chris is in Texas. Buck and Eddie are barely keeping each other's heads above the water. A late-night run-in with a mysterious woman from Eddie's past doesn't help Buck's efforts.
